text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Nghahhh! So many horsies w-wishing me a happy birthday!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I want to remember all of it so bad I've barely 
blinked! Ahh, my memory's fried! I can't!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: A-Are you all right? Do you feel sick…?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I think she feels overwhelmed. Must be a case 
of my aura shining too bright…

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
AHH! It's the peak ship! 
…I mean, hey Doto and Opera O!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm just fine. Nothing to worry about! 
I was just running a liiittle over capacity 
for a minute!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, is that so? Not sure I understand, but… 
Ah, I know!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I shall gift you a few words in my silvery 
voice! That ought to reinvigorate you!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Without further adieu… 
Happy birthday, Digital!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: O-Oh no! Sh-She's become a statue!
